headline: SIGNAL SCAN — Apr 13, 2026
telegramText: SIGNAL SCAN — April 13, 2026 SNAPSHOT Risk-off sentiment dominates as failed US-Iran nuclear talks trigger oil shock and Hormuz blockade fears.
